briefdescription.para: What time are we at?
The destructor.
Disable copying because AmrLevel owns state data and geometry caches.
Disable moving; derived classes manage non-movable FillPatch caches.
Copy assignment is undefined for the same ownership reasons.
Move assignment is also disabled—use factory methods instead.
Derive the directory name for this level inside a plot/checkpoint tree.

parameterdescription.para: Root directory (typically plot or checkpoint folder).
Output: absolute path combining dir and LevelDir.

briefdescription.para: Create the Level_* directory inside dir (if needed) before writing plots/checkpoints.

parameterdescription.para: Base output directory (plot or checkpoint root).

briefdescription.para: Record whether CreateLevelDirectory() has already created the folder.

parameterdescription.para: True if the level directory exists; false to clear the flag.

briefdescription.para: A string written as the first item in writePlotFile() at level zero. It is so we can distinguish between different types of plot files. This default "HyperCLaw-V1.1" is for VisIt software and some of our internal postprocessing routines.

inbodydescription.para: < Default identifier consumed by VisIt and AMReX tools.

briefdescription.para: Write plot file data for this level into directory dir.
Perform pre-plotfile operations (e.g., gather metadata) for directory dir using os.

parameterdescription.para: Plotfile directory about to be written.

briefdescription.para: Perform post-plotfile cleanup for directory dir once writes complete.

parameterdescription.para: Plotfile directory that was just written.
Metadata stream (same one passed to writePlotFilePre()).

briefdescription.para: Write a reduced plot file (same parameters as writePlotFile()) to dir.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &dir, std::ostream &os, VisMF::How how=VisMF::NFiles, bool dump_old=true)
memberdef.name: checkPoint

briefdescription.para: Write current state to a checkpoint directory.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to include the "old" state data.

briefdescription.para: Do pre-checkpoint work (e.g., directory creation) for dir using os.
Do post-checkpoint cleanup for dir once writes complete.

parameterdescription.para: Checkpoint directory that was just written.

briefdescription.para: Populate this level from checkpoint input stream is.

parameterdescription.para: Owning Amr driver (provides geometry and config).
Input stream pointing at the level's checkpoint data.
Whether to parse additional application-specific fields.

briefdescription.para: Hook to adjust which state descriptors are expected in checkpoint streams.

parameterdescription.para: Array of flags (one per descriptor) that this level may modify.

memberdef.argsstring: (int finest_level, int sub_cycle, Vector< int > &n_cycle, const Vector< IntVect > &ref_ratio, Vector< Real > &dt_level, Real stop_time)=0
memberdef.name: computeInitialDt

briefdescription.para: Compute the initial time step size for each level.

parameterdescription.para: Finest AMR level existing so far.
In/out: number of subcycles per level.
Simulation stop time (used to clamp dt if needed).

memberdef.argsstring: (int finest_level, int sub_cycle, Vector< int > &n_cycle, const Vector< IntVect > &ref_ratio, Vector< Real > &dt_min, Vector< Real > &dt_level, Real stop_time, int post_regrid_flag)=0
memberdef.name: computeNewDt

briefdescription.para: Compute the next time step sizes after an advance.

parameterdescription.para: In/out: number of subcycles per level.
Simulation stop time (used to clamp dt).
Flag describing regrid state (0 normal, 1 immediate post-regrid).

memberdef.argsstring: (Real time, Real dt, int iteration, int ncycle)=0
memberdef.name: advance

briefdescription.para: Advance solution on this level by dt and return the next stable dt.

parameterdescription.para: Sub-step counter within the coarse step.
Number of fine subcycles per coarse step.

simplesect.para: Recommended dt for the next call (based on CFL, etc.).

briefdescription.para: Perform level-specific updates after each subcycle.

parameterdescription.para: Sub-step index within the coarse step.

simplesect.para: Override implementations should reset any FillPatcher caches they own.

briefdescription.para: Called once per coarse step after fine levels finish refluxing.
Override to perform any fixups immediately after restart (default: no-op).
Operations to be performed immediately after regridding completes.

parameterdescription.para: Coarsest level that triggered the regrid.
New finest level index after regridding.

briefdescription.para: Operations to run after initialization finishes.

parameterdescription.para: Simulation stop time (useful for multi-stage inits).

briefdescription.para: Return nonzero to continue advancing; zero to halt the run.
Return nonzero if refinement starting from this level is allowed this cycle.

detaileddescription.para: Only evaluated when regrid_int > 0 and level_count >= regrid_int. Default returns true.

briefdescription.para: Init grid data at problem start-up. This is a pure virtual function and hence MUST be implemented by derived classes.
Set the time metadata stored in the state data arrays (old/new).

parameterdescription.para: Dt associated with the old slot.
Dt associated with the new slot.

briefdescription.para: Allocate storage for "old" time slices before an advance.
Delete the old-time slots once they are no longer needed.
Init data on this level from another AmrLevel (during regrid). This is a pure virtual function and hence MUST be implemented by derived classes.

detaileddescription.para: Init data on this level after regridding if old AmrLevel did not previously exist. This is a pure virtual function and hence MUST be implemented by derived classes.

briefdescription.para: Reset data to initial time by swapping new and old time slots.
Returns this AmrLevel index (0 = coarsest).
List of grids at this level.
Return the edge-centered grid layout for direction dir (cached).
Return the nodal grid layout for this level (cached).
Number of grids at this level.
Number of states at this level.
Returns the indices defining physical domain.
Timestep n at this level.
Returns the geometry object.
Returns number of valid cells on this level.
Get the cached BoxArray describing regions that should not be tagged.
Get the Box (single region) that is permitted to be tagged.
Build internal data structures defining the area not to tag.
Override the area-not-to-tag cache with user-supplied BoxArray ba.
Clear cached FillPatcher objects (call after reflux/averaging).

memberdef.argsstring: (TagBoxArray &tb, int clearval, int tagval, Real time, int n_error_buf=0, int ngrow=0)=0
memberdef.name: errorEst

briefdescription.para: Error estimation for regridding. This is a pure virtual function and hence MUST be implemented by derived classes.

parameterdescription.para: Tag array to mark for refinement (output).
Value that clears a tag entry.
Value that marks a cell for refinement.
Physical time at which tagging occurs.
Number of grow cells added around tagged features (default 0).
Number of ghost layers available in tb (default 0).

memberdef.argsstring: (MultiFab &mf, int dcomp, Real time, int state_idx, int scomp, int ncomp, int nghost=0)
memberdef.name: FillCoarsePatch

briefdescription.para: Interpolate from coarse level to the valid area in mf.

detaileddescription.para: Fill mf on this level using data interpolated from the coarser level.

parameterdescription.para: Time at which to sample coarse data.
State descriptor index selecting which state to fill.
Source component index within the coarse state.
Number of ghost cells to fill (default 0).

memberdef.argsstring: (FArrayBox &dest, int state_indx, Real time, int dest_comp, int src_comp, int num_comp)
memberdef.name: setPhysBoundaryValues

briefdescription.para: Apply physical boundary conditions to cell-centered data.

parameterdescription.para: State descriptor index associated with dest.
Physical time at which BCs should be evaluated.
Component offset in the state data.

briefdescription.para: Returns a MultiFab containing the derived data for this level. If ngrow>0 the MultiFab is built on the appropriately grown BoxArray.

parameterdescription.para: Physical time at which to evaluate the quantity.
How many ghost cells to include.

simplesect.para: Owning pointer to a freshly allocated MultiFab.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string &name, Real time, MultiFab &mf, int dcomp)
memberdef.name: derive

briefdescription.para: This version of derive() fills the dcomp'th component of mf with the derived quantity.

parameterdescription.para: Physical time at which to evaluate the quantity.

briefdescription.para: State data object accessor for descriptor state_indx.
Mutable access to the MultiFab at the old time slot for state state_indx.
Const access to the MultiFab at the old time slot for state state_indx.
Mutable access to the MultiFab at the new time slot for state state_indx.
Const access to the MultiFab at the new time slot for state state_indx.
Returns whether a post-timestep regrid is currently requested (nonzero for true).
Set the post-timestep regrid trigger (nonzero requests a regrid).

parameterdescription.para: Trigger value applied after each step.

briefdescription.para: Update every StateData's DistributionMapping to match dmap (e.g., after rebalancing).

detaileddescription.para: Update the distribution maps in StateData based on the size of the map.

parameterdescription.para: Distribution mapping describing the new ownership.

memberdef.argsstring: (int State_Type, int gridno, int strt_comp, int ncomp)
memberdef.name: getBCArray

briefdescription.para: Return an array describing boundary types for components [strt_comp,strt_comp+ncomp).
Fetch the MultiFab (old or new) that best matches time for state state_indx.

simplesect.para: Reference to either the old or new MultiFab, whichever brackets time.

memberdef.argsstring: (MultiFab &S, int state_index, int scomp, int dcomp, int ncomp, Real time) const
memberdef.name: set_preferred_boundary_values

briefdescription.para: Hook to override fillpatched boundary values before applying physical BCs (default no-op).

parameterdescription.para: Physical time at which BCs are evaluated.

briefdescription.para: Adjust tags after core tagging routines run (default: no-op).

parameterdescription.para: Tag arrays built on this level.
Buffer sizes per level from Amr.

briefdescription.para: Override to customize which variables appear in full plotfiles on this level (default uses global list).
Override to customize which variables appear in small plotfiles on this level.
Estimate the amount of work required to advance just this level, typically based on cell counts.

simplesect.para: Work units proportional to the expected compute effort (higher means more expensive).

briefdescription.para: Select which state descriptor drives work estimates.

simplesect.para: State descriptor index used for estimateWork() sampling, or -1 to disable.

briefdescription.para: Returns one the TimeLevel enums. Asserts that time is between AmrOldTime and AmrNewTime.

parameterdescription.para: State descriptor index providing time metadata.

briefdescription.para: Return true if this level requests an immediate checkpoint (default false).

detaileddescription.para: Overrides can trigger checkpointing after conditional events.

briefdescription.para: Return true if this level requests an immediate plotfile (default false).
Return true if this level requests an immediate small-plot file (default false).
Optional particle redistribution hook called by the parent Amr object.

parameterdescription.para: Coarsest level whose particles should be considered.
Whether the call happens during initialization.

memberdef.argsstring: (amrex::MultiFab &mf, int dcomp, int ncomp, int nghost, amrex::Real time, int state_index, int scomp)
memberdef.name: FillPatcherFill

briefdescription.para: Fill ghost cells using cached FillPatcher (level>0) or FillPatch (level 0).

parameterdescription.para: Number of ghost cells to fill.
Time at which to sample data.
State descriptor index to pull from.
Source component offset within the state.

memberdef.argsstring: (int order, int state_type, Real time, Real dt, int iteration, int ncycle, F &&f, P &&p=RungeKutta::PostStageNoOp())
memberdef.name: RK

briefdescription.para: Evolve one step with Runge-Kutta (2, 3, or 4)

detaileddescription.para: To use RK, the StateData must have all the ghost cells needed. See namespace RungeKutta for expected function signatures of the callable parameters.

parameterdescription.para: time at the beginning of the step.

iteration number on fine level during a coarse time step. For an AMR simulation with subcycling and a refinement ratio of 2, the number is either 1 or 2, denoting the first and second substep, respectively.
number of subcyling steps. It's usually 2 or 4. Without subcycling, this will be 1.
computing right-hand side for evolving the StateData. One can also register data for flux registers in this.

briefdescription.para: Return true if name matches a registered state variable, also providing descriptor info.

parameterdescription.para: Output: number of components associated with that state.

briefdescription.para: Resize/clear cached FillPatchIterator state in preparation for new fill operations.
Returns list of Descriptors.
Returns list of derived variables.

memberdef.argsstring: (AmrLevel &amrlevel, MultiFab &leveldata, int boxGrow, Real time, int index, int scomp, int ncomp, int dcomp=0)
memberdef.name: FillPatch

briefdescription.para: Convenience wrapper around FillPatchSingleLevel/TwoLevels.

parameterdescription.para: Number of grow cells to request.

memberdef.argsstring: (AmrLevel &amrlevel, MultiFab &leveldata, int boxGrow, Real time, int index, int scomp, int ncomp, int dcomp=0)
memberdef.name: FillPatchAdd

briefdescription.para: Same as FillPatch(), but adds into leveldata instead of overwriting.

parameterdescription.para: Number of grow cells to request.

memberdef.argsstring: (int nbasic, int nvolume, int nfull) noexcept
memberdef.name: SetEBMaxGrowCells

briefdescription.para: Configure the ghost-cell requirements (basic/volume/full) for EB FillPatch operations.
Select which level of EB data to build (basic, volume, full) via ebs.

memberdef.argsstring: (AmrLevel const &amr_level, int boxGrow, IndexType const &boxType, StateDescriptor const &desc, int SComp)
memberdef.name: ProperBlockingFactor

briefdescription.para: Recommendation of a proper blocking factor for filling.

parameterdescription.para: Grow cells requested by the caller.
State descriptor tied to the data.

briefdescription.para: The constructors for derived classes.

memberdef.argsstring: (Amr &papa, int lev, const Geometry &level_geom, const BoxArray &ba, const DistributionMapping &dm, Real time)
memberdef.name: AmrLevel

briefdescription.para: Common code used by all constructors.

memberdef.argsstring: (int state_type, Real time, Real dt, MultiFab const &S_old, Array< MultiFab, order > const &rkk)
memberdef.name: storeRKCoarseData

memberdef.argsstring: (int state_index, MultiFab &S, Real time, int stage, int iteration, int ncycle)
memberdef.name: FillRKPatch

briefdescription.para: Virtual base class for managing individual levels. AmrLevel functions both as a container for state data on a level and also manages the advancement of data in time.
